info.title: Electronic Signature
info.description: A set of API end points for electronic signatures. These signature records become a permanent part of the product history and must be made available. Electronic signatures always have at least one context, a reason, and a signatory to decribe them.

x-sap-shortText: Maintain and make available Electronic Signatures in Digital Manufacturing

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

get.summary: Retrieve a list of electronic signatures.
get.description: Electronic signatures should be retrievable based on their context, context values, signatory, or any other property of a signature record. See [Samples](https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/apis/electronic-signature-queries)

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter items by property values. For more information, see [Filtering](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionfilter)

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Order items by property values. For more information, see [Sorting](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionorderby)

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select properties to be returned. For more information, see [Select](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionselect)

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The value of $expand query option is a comma-separated list of navigation property names, stream property names, or $value indicating the stream content of a media-entity. The corresponding related entities and stream values will be represented inline. For more information, see [Expand](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionexpand)

@count.description: The count of retrieved signatures if $count parameter is true.

SignatureService.SignatureContextValues.title: values
SignatureService.SignatureContextValues.description: The context values defined as a set of name and value pairs. These pairs uniquely describe or define the given context for this signature record.

SignatureService.SignatureContexts.title: contexts

type.description: The type of this context object.

objectId.description: Optional unique identifier for this context object

values@count.description: The context values count if the $count parameter for context values is true.

values.description: A list of context values defining a set of name value pairs. These pairs uniquely describe or define the given context for this signature record.

SignatureService.SignatureContexts.description: Provides a context for the signature record. A context is decribed by one or more values and a type.

SignatureService.signatureLogs.title: Signature Logs

plant.description: The plant in which the signature is created.

signatory.description: The person or entity associated with this signature.

comment.description: An optional comment for this signature.

pass.description: A flag indicating if the signatory authentication and authorization succeeds or fails.

failureCause.description: The cause of failure, if the signatory authentication or authorization fails.

createdAt.description: Creation time stamp of the signature.

contexts@count.description: The count if $count parameter for Contexts is true.

contexts.description: The list of contexts for a signature.

SignatureService.signatureLogs.description: The entity defining and describing an electronic signature.

count.description: The number of entities in the collection. Available when using the [$count](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptioncount) query option.

innererror.description: The structure of this object is service-specific

top.name: $top
top.description: Show only the first n items. For more information, see [Paging - Top](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptiontop)

skip.name: $skip
skip.description: Skip the first n items. For more information, see [Paging - Skip](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionskip)

count.name: $count
count.description: Include count of item. For more information, see [Count](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptioncount)

search.name: $search
search.description: Search items by search phrases. For more information, see [Searching](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_SystemQueryOptionsearch)
